language_packs.page_description: Centrally manage core and extension language packs.
language_packs.title: Language Pack Management
language_packs.description: Install and remove language packs via ZIP upload or GitHub URL.
language_packs.search_placeholder: Search by identifier, vendor, or language

detail.title: Language Pack Details
detail.built_in_description: This entry is a translation directly bundled into the core or a bundled extension. It has no separate language pack metadata. It is always active and cannot be modified or removed.
detail.name: Name
detail.depends_on_core_locale_yes: This pack requires the core language pack for the same locale to be active.
detail.depends_on_core_locale_no: This pack operates independently of the core language pack.
detail.target_version_mismatch: Target extension version does not match the compatibility constraint.
detail.no_changelog: This language pack has no CHANGELOG.md file.

uninstall.title: Remove Language Pack
uninstall.body: Remove {{scope}} / {{target}} / {{locale}} language pack. This cannot be undone.
uninstall.cascade_label: Also deactivate all sub-extension packs for this locale
uninstall.warning: This action cannot be undone. User-edited translations will also be removed.
uninstall.cascade_hint: Active dependent module/plugin/template language packs will also be deactivated.

refresh_cache.body: Invalidate translation, registry, and template language caches.

modals.module_menu_notice: Module default menu cannot be changed.

form.create_description: Create a new role and configure permissions.
form.name: Role Name
form.identifier_hint: Must start with a lowercase letter. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores allowed.
form.identifier_readonly_hint: Identifier cannot be changed after creation.
form.description_placeholder: Enter a description for this role
form.is_active_hint: Inactive roles cannot be assigned to new users
form.permissions_hint: Select permissions to grant to this role. Click a group to expand or collapse.

schedules.title: Schedule Management
schedules.description: View and manage schedules (crontab, Jobs) registered in the system.

form.name: Name
form.command_help: Enter an Artisan command, shell command, or URL
form.without_overlapping_help: Skip new task when previous is still running
form.run_in_maintenance_help: Execute task even during system maintenance
form.is_active_help: Inactive schedules will not run automatically

modals.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule? Related execution history will also be deleted.
modals.run_confirm: Are you sure you want to run this schedule now?

settings.readonly_notice: These settings are read-only. Contact your administrator for edit access.

general.site_description_placeholder: Enter a brief description of your site.
general.site_logo_desc: Logo image to be displayed in the header.
general.upload_drag_drop: Click or drag and drop files to upload

mail.smtp_settings_desc: Configure SMTP server for email delivery.
mail.test_mail_desc: Send a test email to verify your settings.
mail.test_email_placeholder: Email address to receive test mail
mail.mailgun_settings_desc: Send emails through the Mailgun API.

upload.allowed_extensions_hint: Enter allowed file extensions separated by commas.
upload.image_settings_desc: Auto-resize and quality settings for uploaded images.
upload.image_quality_hint: Enter a value between 1-100. Higher values mean better quality.

seo.meta_settings_desc: Configure meta tags for search engine optimization.
seo.meta_title_suffix_hint: Text appended to all page titles. (e.g., ' | Gnuboard7')
seo.meta_description_placeholder: Enter the default meta description for your site.
seo.meta_description_hint: Description shown in search results. Max 160 characters recommended.
seo.generator_settings_desc: Generator meta tag for CMS identification. W3Techs and similar market-share trackers use this to classify the site as GnuBoard7.
seo.generator_enabled_desc: When disabled, the meta tag is not emitted at all.
seo.generator_content_hint: Leave empty to auto-apply "GnuBoard7 {version}". Enter only "GnuBoard7" to hide the version.
seo.og_twitter_settings_desc: Default meta values used by Facebook, Slack, Twitter, etc. for link previews. Per-page values declared in layouts override these.
seo.og_default_site_name_hint: Defaults to the site name from General settings. Enter a value only to show a different name in share previews (og:site_name). Leave empty to follow the General settings site name.
seo.og_image_default_size_hint: Default values when thumbnail size is unknown. Facebook recommends 1200×630, minimum 200×200.
seo.twitter_default_card_hint: Use summary_large_image for large image cards, summary for compact ones.
seo.twitter_default_site_hint: The site's Twitter handle (e.g. @gnuboard). Output is omitted if empty.
seo.google_analytics_id_hint: GA4 Measurement ID (G-XXXXXXXXXX) or UA Tracking ID (UA-XXXXX-X)
seo.verification_settings_desc: Enter site verification codes for search engines.
seo.bot_settings_desc: Configure search bot detection and SEO page generation.
seo.bot_detection_enabled_desc: Detect search bots and serve SEO-optimized HTML.
seo.bot_detection_library_enabled_desc: When disabled, only the "Additional Bot Patterns" list below is used to detect bots.
seo.bot_library_notice_body: Automatically detects around 1,000 search engines, link-preview bots, and AI crawlers. Pasting links into Slack, KakaoTalk, Facebook, and similar services will instantly show the title, description, and image preview. Use the "Additional Bot Patterns" field below only when a bot is missing from the auto-detection list.
seo.bot_user_agents_hint: User-Agent substring (case-insensitive) — patterns to treat as bot on top of library defaults.
seo.cache_enabled_desc: Cache SEO pages to improve response time.
seo.sitemap_enabled_desc: Automatically generate sitemap.xml for search engines.
seo.sitemap_cache_ttl_hint: Min 3600s (1 hour), max 604800s (7 days). Default: 86400s (24 hours)

security.title: Security Settings
security.force_https_desc: Force all connections to use HTTPS.
security.login_attempt_limit_desc: Lock account after certain number of failed login attempts.
security.login_lockout_time_full: Lockout Time After Exceeding Login Attempts (minutes)
security.app_key_desc: Manage the application key used for encryption.
security.app_key_warning: Changing the key may make previously encrypted data inaccessible.

messages.title: Identity Verification Message Templates
messages.intro: Edit the subject and body used for identity verification emails. Both Korean and English can be entered, and you can restore the default at any time. Admin-created policies can be paired with their own messages.
messages.toggle_success: Message definition active state has been changed.

add_modal.title: Add Message Definition
add_modal.policy_empty: No admin policies registered. Please add a policy in the Policies tab first.
add_modal.name: Name
add_modal.subject: Subject

delete_modal.title: Delete Message Definition
delete_modal.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this message definition?
delete_modal.warning_message: All linked channel templates will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

reset_modal.title: Reset to Default
reset_modal.confirm_message: Reset all channel templates of this definition to seed defaults?
reset_modal.warning_message: All admin edits will be lost. This action cannot be undone.

modal.title: Edit Message Template
modal.subject: Subject
modal.reset_confirm: All operator edits will be replaced with the seeded default. Continue?

basic.title: Basic Settings
basic.desc: Configure provider-level parameters. Activation and enforcement timing are managed under the Policies tab.
basic.default_provider_desc: Provider used when a purpose does not specify one.
basic.max_attempts_desc: Challenge is locked after this many consecutive failures. Re-send is required.

purposes.title: Purpose-specific Providers
purposes.desc: Assign a provider to each IDV purpose. Unassigned purposes use the default provider.

providers.title: Providers
providers.desc: Registered IDV providers. Additional providers can be added via plugins.

logs_link.title: Verification Logs
logs_link.desc: View challenge request, verification, and expiry history.

storage.title: File Storage
storage.s3_url_desc: Only enter if using a custom endpoint or CDN URL.

session.title: Session
session.redis_shared_notice: Uses Redis settings from cache when Redis is selected.

queue.title: Queue
queue.worker_notice: Queue worker must be running when using database or redis.
queue.redis_shared_notice: Uses Redis settings from cache when Redis is selected.

log.title: Logging
log.level_desc: Only logs at or above this level will be recorded.
log.retention_desc: Log files older than the specified period will be automatically deleted.

websocket.title: WebSocket (Reverb)
websocket.desc: Configure WebSocket server for real-time communication.
websocket.enabled_desc: Enable real-time features via Laravel Reverb.
websocket.reverb_notice: Reverb server must be running when WebSocket is enabled.
websocket.verify_ssl_desc: Disable for self-signed certificates. Must be enabled in production.
websocket.server_endpoint_desc: Internal address used by the backend to deliver broadcast events to the Reverb server. The host/port above is for browser access, while this value is for backend → Reverb internal communication. Leave empty to use the same values as the client endpoint above.

search_engine.title: Search Engine
search_engine.desc: Configure the search engine driver for integrated and admin search.
search_engine.driver_desc: The built-in MySQL FULLTEXT (ngram) engine supports Korean search without additional configuration.
search_engine.plugin_notice: Additional drivers will appear when search engine plugins (Meilisearch, Elasticsearch, etc.) are installed.

drivers.test_before_save: Please test connection before using external services

advanced.cache_ttl_zero_hint: Set TTL to 0 for unlimited cache (never expires).
advanced.debug_mode_desc: Show detailed error messages. Disable in production.
advanced.sql_query_log_desc: Log executed SQL queries. Log file location: /storage/logs/query.log
advanced.core_update_desc: Configure GitHub authentication for core and extension (module/plugin/template) updates.
advanced.core_update_github_url_desc: GitHub repository URL to check for core updates. (Core only)
advanced.core_update_github_token_desc: Used for core and extension updates from private repositories. Fine-grained PAT permission: Contents (Read-only). Leave empty for public repositories.
advanced.geoip_section_desc: Automatically detects the timezone from the IP address of unauthenticated users. Requires a free MaxMind license key.
advanced.geoip_enabled_desc: Turning this on enables the license key input and periodic DB updates.
advanced.geoip_license_key_desc: Enter the license key issued from your free MaxMind account. Get one at https://www.maxmind.com/en/geolite2/signup.
advanced.geoip_auto_update_enabled_desc: Automatically re-downloads the MaxMind GeoLite2-City DB once a week (Wednesday 03:00).

notification_definitions.title: Notification Settings
notification_definitions.toggle_success: Notification active status has been changed.
notification_definitions.reset_success: Notification has been reset to default.

reset_modal.title: Reset to Default
reset_modal.confirm_message: All channel templates of this notification will be restored to defaults.
reset_modal.warning_message: The saved subject, body, and recipient settings will be permanently lost.

edit_modal.title: Edit Notification Template
edit_modal.subject: Subject
edit_modal.click_url_hint: URL to navigate when the notification is clicked. Use {variable} for dynamic values. (e.g., /mypage/orders/{order_number})

info.update_available_message: A new version is available. View the changelog and update via terminal.
info.no_update_message: You are using the latest version.
info.update_guide_warning: Core updates can only be performed from the terminal. Please backup your database before updating.
info.update_guide_desc: Connect to your server terminal and run the following command in the Gnuboard7 installation directory.
info.update_guide_note: Maintenance mode is automatically enabled during updates and disabled after completion.
info.manual_update_desc: If PHP zip extension or unzip command is not available on your server, you can download the release ZIP from GitHub and update manually.
info.manual_update_step1: # 1. Download ZIP from GitHub releases page and extract on server
info.manual_update_step2: # 2. Run update with the extracted path
info.upgrade_guide_link_desc: See the upgrade guide for permission notes and per-version paths.

modals.app_key_warning: Changing the key will invalidate all sessions and may make previously encrypted data inaccessible. Please proceed with caution.

layout_edit.preview_layout_select_description: This extension point is used by multiple layouts. Select a layout to preview.

challenge.title: Identity Verification
challenge.code_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent you.
challenge.expired: The code has expired. Please resend.
challenge.link_subtitle: Click the link sent to your email to complete verification.
challenge.check_spam: If you don't see the email, please check your spam folder.
challenge.external_subtitle: You will be redirected to the verification provider shortly.

policies.page_description: Decide when identity verification is enforced — for signup, password reset, or sensitive actions. Default policies provided by core/modules/plugins allow limited editing; policies you create can be edited and deleted freely.
policies.purposes_section_description: Built-in purposes provided by the core. Available in the policy "Purpose" column. Modules/plugins that declare additional purposes show them on their own settings page.
policies.search_placeholder: Search by policy key or target
policies.delete_confirm: Delete this policy? (only admin-created policies can be deleted)
policies.toggle_failed: Failed to update policy active state.

scope_desc.route: Triggered when a user calls a specific API route (e.g. signup, password reset).
scope_desc.hook: Triggered on internal events (e.g. just after signup, just before user update).
scope_desc.custom: Custom trigger defined by a plugin.

form.scope_help: Choose which kind of request enforces identity verification.
form.target_help: Depending on the trigger, enter the route name (e.g. api.auth.register) or the event name (e.g. core.auth.after_register).
form.purpose_help: Pick what kind of identity verification this policy requires.
form.grace_minutes_help: If the user verified within this window, do not ask again. Set to 0 to always require verification.
form.priority_desc: When multiple policies apply to the same location, a higher number is applied first. Saving is rejected if two policies share the same location and the same number, since the order of enforcement would be undefined.
form.signup_stage_before_submit: Before submission — verification code must accompany the signup form
form.signup_stage_after_create: After signup, before activation — verification message sent right after signup, account activates after verification
form.signup_stage_desc: For signup policies, choose which stage requires verification.
form.declared_policy_notice: This is a default policy provided by core/module/plugin. The Policy key, Enforcement timing, and Enforcement location cannot be changed; all other fields (Purpose, Applies to, Verification method, Re-prompt window, On-failure, Active, etc.) are freely editable, and your overrides are preserved across updates.

logs.page_description: View challenge lifecycle history. Default retention: 180 days.
logs.search_placeholder: Search by user ID or target identifier
logs.purge_confirm: Delete all logs older than 180 days. Continue?

admin_settings.settings_password_confirm_modal: Verify Password for App Key Regeneration
